title: Take the Greenpill with Greenpill Nigeria
dek: A public Hub source supports Nigeria's 10-week ReFi and public-goods education program.
excerpt: Greenpill Nigeria ran a 10-week education series introducing ReFi and public-goods concepts.
body:
The research artifact identifies this public Hub thread as a strong education proof point for Greenpill Nigeria.

For page implementation, this should support education-oriented chapter cards, story filters, and proof signals. Avoid adding attendee counts or completion metrics that the source does not explicitly support.

## Sources

- S016: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/take-the-greenpill-with-greenpill-nigeria-10-weeks-of-refi-education/324
author: Greenpill Network research

seo.title: Take the Greenpill with Greenpill Nigeria · Greenpill Stories
seo.description: Source-backed seed story for Greenpill Nigeria's 10-week ReFi and public-goods education program.
